vdb_search_docs.name: vdb_search_docs
vdb_search_docs.description: Document-level semantic retrieval from the vector store. Use for broad topical recall when you need a few candidate passages or documents related to the question. For stronger local evidence, prefer `hybrid_evidence_search` or `vdb_search_sentences`.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Semantic search query describing the information need.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of document-level hits to return. Default 5.

vdb_get_docs_by_document_ids.name: vdb_get_docs_by_document_ids
vdb_get_docs_by_document_ids.description: Fetch raw document chunks by document_id from the vector store. Use it after another tool has already produced source document_ids and you need the underlying text for grounding or follow-up reading.

parameters.name: document_ids
parameters.description: List of document_ids whose chunks should be returned.

vdb_search_sentences.name: vdb_search_sentences
vdb_search_sentences.description: Sentence-level semantic retrieval for fine-grained evidence. Strong when the answer depends on a specific sentence, paraphrased statement, short fact, reason, attitude, implication, or other local detail and the exact wording is unknown. It is weaker when used alone for immediate before/after questions, because top hits can mix the anchor event with later downstream consequences from nearby sentences. In those cases, prefer or pair it with a scene- or section-grounded retrieval path.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Semantic sentence-search query. Phrase it as the fact or evidence you want to find.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sentence hits to return. Default 5.
